dashboard.successTitle: Your investment has seen the light! ☀️
dashboard.successBody: Hello, {name}. Your USDT deposit has been successfully verified. Your capital is now working for you at Sunshine. It's time to watch your returns grow!
dashboard.errorTitle: ⚠️ There was a problem with your deposit
dashboard.errorBody: Hello, {name}. We could not verify your last USDT investment request. This may be due to an unclear proof or an error in the data sent.
dashboard.errorBody2: Please, review your transaction and try again. If you believe this is an error, contact our Sunshine support team.
